nodes.title: Atlanta 1910
nodes.bodyDelta: {"ops":[{"insert":"Commissioned by some wealthy Atlantan. Only lasted a few years, then was built over by an airport or something.\n"}]}
nodes.bodyHtml: Commissioned by some wealthy Atlantan. Only lasted a few years, then was built over by an airport or something.

nodes.title: Ford 999
nodes.bodyHtml: Made to beat a land speed record.

nodes.title: Maxwell Special
nodes.bodyDelta: {"ops":[{"insert":"Indy 500 car made in the Heroic Era by Maxwell with Eddie Rickenbacker.\nLost to a Puegeot that had DOHC in 1916.\n"}]}
nodes.bodyHtml:
Indy 500 car made in the Heroic Era by Maxwell with Eddie Rickenbacker.

Lost to a Puegeot that had DOHC in 1916.
